svg.aria-label: Interactive schematic of advertised versus effective context. A quality curve over input length from 1K to 1M tokens on a log axis, with the advertised 1M window marked. Three buttons switch the task: single needle stays near 100% all the way — saturated; multi-needle (MRCR-class) holds and then falls hard, around 57% by 128K; reasoning over the context (NoLiMa-class) falls earliest, below half of baseline by 32K. A dashed threshold marks where the model still works; where the curve crosses it is the effective context.
svg.text: One planted fact, recited back — near-perfect all the way to 1M. Saturated: the entry ticket, not the proof.
